name: Masked HERO Blast
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｍ・ＨＥＲＯ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>マスクドヒーロー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> ブラスト
desc: Must be Special Summoned with "Mask Change". If this card is Special Summoned: You can target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; its ATK becomes half its current ATK. Once per turn (Quick Effect): You can pay 500 LP, then target 1 Spell/Trap your opponent controls; return it to the hand.
mnst_eff: Must be Special Summoned with "Mask Change". If this card is Special Summoned: You can target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; its ATK becomes half its current ATK. Once per turn (Quick Effect): You can pay 500 LP, then target 1 Spell/Trap your opponent controls; return it to the hand.
eff: Must be Special Summoned with "Mask Change". If this card is Special Summoned: You can target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; its ATK becomes half its current ATK. Once per turn (Quick Effect): You can pay 500 LP, then target 1 Spell/Trap your opponent controls; return it to the hand.

jp_sets.set: Tactical-Try Pack: Dark Magic / HERO / Mikanko

action: Returns from your opponent's field to your opponent's hand
summoning: Must be Special Summoned by a specific card effect
